name: Tf2_LTR_family
description: Tf2 retrotransposon family in S. pombe. ~4.9 kb gypsy-class LTR retrotransposon with ~350 bp LTRs. The reference Sp972h- genome carries 13 full-length Tf2 elements plus ~30 solo LTRs and several Tf2 fragments. Tf1 elements were lost from S. pombe and are present only as relic insertions. Tf2 transcription is repressed by Mei4 / CENP-B (Abp1/Cbh1/Cbh2) homologs and the HIRA chromatin chaperone; derepression in HIRA mutants or under stress (heat, nitrogen starvation) yields ~30-fold mRNA induction.

architecture.internal_structure: 4900 bp dispersed unit; LTR 350 bp where applicable
